metadata.title: AI Product Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate polished ecommerce product visuals with built-in commercial prompts, styles, backgrounds, and lighting presets.

page.title: AI Product Image Generator
page.description: Turn a simple product idea into professional ecommerce photography with preset commercial styling, backgrounds, and lighting.

generator.title: Product Image Generator
generator.description: Built for high-converting hero shots, catalog images, and marketplace-ready product visuals.

fields.product_placeholder: Example: a matte black stainless steel water bottle
fields.details_placeholder: Materials, packaging, flavor, texture, audience, premium selling points, what should be visible on the product
fields.brand_color_placeholder: Example: sage green, rose gold, cobalt blue
fields.tip: This generator uses internal commercial photography prompts so users can work through structured controls instead of writing a full prompt from scratch.

generator.empty_prompt: Describe the product first and the internal prompt builder will compose a commercial photography prompt for you.
generator.preview_description: Professional product shots will appear here after the task finishes.
generator.empty_title: Ready for your first product render
generator.empty_description: Pick the look, choose a background, then generate a polished ecommerce visual without writing a full studio prompt.

status.pending: Waiting for the image task to start

errors.product_required: Please enter the product you want to sell.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to continue.
errors.failed: Failed to generate the product image.
errors.timeout: Image generation timed out. Please try again.
